contract.receipt: side effect — one receipt line per successful review

modeCatalog.purpose: the raw mode — its own escape, the one legal self-reference
a customHook naming no catalog key
whenToUse: never — the hook does not resolve

modeCatalog.purpose: a contract-backed primary claiming to be its own escape
whenToUse: never — only a contract-free raw mode is its own escape

modeCatalog.purpose: a customHook naming another primary rather than an env-hook
whenToUse: never — a hook is an env-hook or the entry itself

modeCatalog.purpose: a customHook naming an env-hook that does not list this entry as a parent
whenToUse: never — the hook does not target this mode

modeCatalog.purpose: an env-hook targeting the raw mode only
whenToUse: a throwaway probe of the raw mode

modeCatalog.purpose: a customHooks block that is not an array
whenToUse: never — customHooks is an array of catalog keys

modeCatalog.purpose: a mode an env-hook claims as a parent while declaring no hook of its own
whenToUse: never — the discovery surface would omit a hook that really modifies this mode

modeCatalog.purpose: an env-hook whose parent never declares it back, listed twice
whenToUse: never — the linkage must be symmetric and each parent named once

modeCatalog.purpose: an env-hook claiming another env-hook as its parent
whenToUse: never — a hook modifies a MODE, not another hook

modeCatalog.purpose: an env-hook naming itself as its own parent
whenToUse: never — a hook modifies a mode, never itself
